name: Stardust Dragon/Assault Mode
name_jp: スターダスト・ドラゴン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>／</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スラッシュ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>バスター
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with "Assault Mode Activate" (or by its own effect). When a card or effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this effect was activated this turn (and was not negated): You can Special Summon this card from your GY. When this card on the field is destroyed: You can target 1 "Stardust Dragon" in your GY; Special Summon it.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with "Assault Mode Activate" (or by its own effect). When a card or effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this effect was activated this turn (and was not negated): You can Special Summon this card from your GY. When this card on the field is destroyed: You can target 1 "Stardust Dragon" in your GY; Special Summon it.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with "Assault Mode Activate" (or by its own effect). When a card or effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it. action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
summoning: Must be Special Summoned by a specific card effect
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
